transcript: Yeah... I'm lookin' for, uh, Check It Nice Clothing. It's called Check It Nice Clothing.
And, I'm sayin', all caps, bud. All caps. You know what I'm sayin'?
Excuse me, no, I don't know what you're sayin'.
No, yeah, I don't know what you're talkin' about, man. I don't have that.
Ch... Check It Nice. [looped, low pitch] Check It Nice. That's the name of the clothing.

You got to understand what I'm talkin'. [looped, low pitch] You got to understand what I'm-- If you don't, you know, I'm gonna come down. I'm gonna kick my boots around a little bit, left and right. How's that grab ya?
[laughs] How many people am I talking to?
